name: Partially my fault in work injury Midvale Utah, still get comp?

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault in work injury Midvale Utah, still get comp?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, workers comp is no-fault—benefits regardless.** Fault irrelevant for employer claim[3]. **Key factors:** Third-party suits consider comparative negligence. **Practical guidance:** Report honestly, focus on medical. Sue others if applicable. **No-fault speeds benefits.**
